assets.actionFailed: The asset action could not be completed.
assets.chooseAssetDescription: Browse the library and choose a reusable asset.
assets.couldNotLoadDescription: Check your connection and try again.
assets.createFolderDescription: Create a folder to keep related assets together.
assets.deleteFolderDescription: Delete {{name}} and its subfolders? Assets inside will move to the library root.
assets.emptyDescription: Upload image, video, or audio assets to reuse them across TaleLabs.
assets.endOfLibrary: You've reached the end of your asset library.
assets.endOfResults: You've reached the end of these results.
assets.moveFilesDescription_one: Choose where to move this asset.
assets.moveFilesDescription_other: Choose where to move these {{count}} assets.
assets.moveRejectedDepth: That folder would exceed the maximum nesting depth.
assets.moveRejectedDescendant: A folder cannot be moved into one of its subfolders.
assets.moveRejectedSameFolder: These items are already in that folder.
assets.moveRejectedSelf: A folder cannot be moved into itself.
assets.noResultsDescription: Try a different search or filter.
assets.purgeDescription: Delete {{name}} permanently? Its media cannot be recovered. Historical references remain as a placeholder.
assets.supportedFiles: Images up to {{imageLimit}}, video up to {{videoLimit}}, and audio up to {{audioLimit}}
assets.uploadDescription: Assets upload directly to TaleLabs and become reusable after processing.
assets.uploadBlockedDescription: The storage request was blocked before the upload started. Check the bucket CORS policy and try again.
assets.uploadFailedDescription: The asset could not be uploaded. Try again, or contact support if the problem continues.
assets.uploadRejectedDescription: Storage rejected the upload. Check the storage configuration and try again.
assets.editTagsDescription: Assign or create tags for this asset.

workspace.createToStart: Create your organization to start using the workspace.

auth.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Sign in again.
auth.userAlreadyExists: An account already exists for this email address.
auth.useWorkEmail: Use your work email to continue.

cookies.analyticsDescription: Helps us understand how you use TaleLabs so we can improve the product. This data is aggregated and not used for advertising.
cookies.description: Manage how TaleLabs uses cookies and similar technologies. Essential cookies are always active.
cookies.essentialDescription: Required for TaleLabs to function. Handles authentication, security, and core product features.
cookies.marketingDescription: Allows us to measure campaign effectiveness and show relevant content across other platforms.
cookies.preferencesDescription: Manage analytics and marketing cookie choices.
cookies.title: Cookie preferences

search.description: Search pages, settings, folders, and assets.
search.placeholder: Search pages, settings, folders, and assets...
search.title: Search

organizations.slugDescription: Used in your workspace URL and invitation links.
organizations.title: Create your organization

errors.organization_access_required: You do not have access to this organization.
